title: anserina urbica
intro: Anserina urbica, also known as Wild Chamomile or Matricaria discoidea, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and calming effects, making it useful for treating digestive issues, anxiety, and skin problems. The health benefits of Anserina urbica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, promote relaxation, and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Anserina urbica include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to address a range of health concerns, from skin irritations to anxiety and stress.
